Name: Created Tickets
Expression:
VAR periodStart = [Period Start]
  VAR periodEnd   = [Period End]
  RETURN
  CALCULATE(
      COUNTROWS(FactFreshdesk),
      FactFreshdesk[created_at] >= periodStart,
      FactFreshdesk[created_at] <= periodEnd
  )

Name: Created Tickets Prev
Expression:
VAR periodStart = [Prev Period Start]
  VAR periodEnd   = [Prev Period End]
  RETURN
  CALCULATE(
      COUNTROWS(FactFreshdesk),
      FactFreshdesk[created_at] >= periodStart,
      FactFreshdesk[created_at] <= periodEnd
  )

Name: Created Tickets Δ%
Expression: DIVIDE([Created Tickets] - [Created Tickets Prev], [Created Tickets Prev])

Name: Waiting for Triage
Expression:
VAR periodStart = [Period Start]
  VAR periodEnd   = [Period End]
  RETURN
  CALCULATE(
      COUNTROWS(FactFreshdesk),
      FactFreshdesk[first_waiting_at] >= periodStart,
      FactFreshdesk[first_waiting_at] <= periodEnd,
      NOT ISBLANK(FactFreshdesk[first_waiting_at])
  )

Name: Waiting for Triage Prev
Expression:
VAR periodStart = [Prev Period Start]
  VAR periodEnd   = [Prev Period End]
  RETURN
  CALCULATE(
      COUNTROWS(FactFreshdesk),
      FactFreshdesk[first_waiting_at] >= periodStart,
      FactFreshdesk[first_waiting_at] <= periodEnd,
      NOT ISBLANK(FactFreshdesk[first_waiting_at])
  )

Name: Waiting for Triage Δ%
Expression: DIVIDE([Waiting for Triage] - [Waiting for Triage Prev], [Waiting for Triage Prev])

Name: Passed Triage
Expression:
VAR periodStart = [Period Start]
  VAR periodEnd   = [Period End]
  RETURN
  CALCULATE(
      COUNTROWS(FactFreshdesk),
      FactFreshdesk[first_passed_at] >= periodStart,
      FactFreshdesk[first_passed_at] <= periodEnd,
      NOT ISBLANK(FactFreshdesk[first_passed_at])
  )

Name: Passed Triage Prev
Expression:
VAR periodStart = [Prev Period Start]
  VAR periodEnd   = [Prev Period End]
  RETURN
  CALCULATE(
      COUNTROWS(FactFreshdesk),
      FactFreshdesk[first_passed_at] >= periodStart,
      FactFreshdesk[first_passed_at] <= periodEnd,
      NOT ISBLANK(FactFreshdesk[first_passed_at])
  )

Name: Passed Triage Δ%
Expression: DIVIDE([Passed Triage] - [Passed Triage Prev], [Passed Triage Prev])

Name: Escalated Tickets
Expression:
VAR periodStart = [Period Start]
  VAR periodEnd   = [Period End]
  RETURN
  CALCULATE(
      COUNTROWS(FactFreshdesk),
      FactFreshdesk[created_at] >= periodStart,
      FactFreshdesk[created_at] <= periodEnd,
      NOT ISBLANK(FactFreshdesk[first_waiting_at])
  )

Name: Escalation Rate
Expression: DIVIDE([Escalated Tickets], [Created Tickets])

Name: Escalation Rate Prev
Expression:
VAR periodStart = [Prev Period Start]
  VAR periodEnd   = [Prev Period End]
  RETURN
  DIVIDE(
      CALCULATE(
          COUNTROWS(FactFreshdesk),
          FactFreshdesk[created_at] >= periodStart,
          FactFreshdesk[created_at] <= periodEnd,
          NOT ISBLANK(FactFreshdesk[first_waiting_at])
      ),
      [Created Tickets Prev]
  )

Name: Escalation Rate Δpp
Expression: [Escalation Rate] - [Escalation Rate Prev]  // percentage points, not %

Name: Triage Denied
Expression:
VAR periodStart = [Period Start]
  VAR periodEnd   = [Period End]
  RETURN
  COALESCE(
      CALCULATE(
          COUNTROWS(FactFreshdesk),
          FactFreshdesk[denied_triage] = TRUE(),
          FactFreshdesk[denied_triage_at] >= periodStart,
          FactFreshdesk[denied_triage_at] <= periodEnd
      ),
      0
  )

Name: Triage Denied Prev
Expression:
VAR periodStart = [Prev Period Start]
  VAR periodEnd   = [Prev Period End]
  RETURN
  COALESCE(
    CALCULATE(
      COUNTROWS(FactFreshdesk),
      FactFreshdesk[denied_triage] = TRUE(),
      FactFreshdesk[denied_triage_at] >= periodStart,
      FactFreshdesk[denied_triage_at] <= periodEnd
  ),
  0
  )

Name: Triage Denied Δ
Expression:
var diff = [Triage Denied] - [Triage Denied Prev]
RETURN diff

Name: Escalation Rate (Chart)
Expression:
VAR total     = COUNTROWS(FactFreshdesk)
  VAR escalated = CALCULATE(
      COUNTROWS(FactFreshdesk),
      NOT ISBLANK(FactFreshdesk[first_waiting_at])
  )
  RETURN
  IF(ISBLANK(total), 0, DIVIDE(escalated, total) * 100)

Name: FD Waited Longest
Expression:
VAR earliestWaiting =
      CALCULATE(
          MIN(FactFreshdesk[first_waiting_at]),
          FactFreshdesk[triage_status] = "Waiting"
      )
  RETURN
  IF(
      ISBLANK(earliestWaiting),
      BLANK(),
      DATEDIFF(earliestWaiting, TODAY(), DAY)
  )

Name: FD Tickets Waiting Over Threshold
Expression:
VAR threshold = [Wait Threshold Value]
  RETURN
  CALCULATE(
      COUNTROWS(FactFreshdesk),
      FILTER(
          FactFreshdesk,
          FactFreshdesk[triage_status] = "Waiting" &&
          DATEDIFF(FactFreshdesk[first_waiting_at], TODAY(), DAY) > threshold
      )
  )

Name: Last Completed Week
Expression:
MAXX(
    FILTER(
        ALL(DimDate),
        DimDate[date_key] < TODAY()
    ),
    DimDate[isoweek]
)

Name: Last Date in Data
Expression:
MAXX(
    FILTER(
        ALL(DimDate),
        DimDate[date_key] < TODAY()
    ),
    DimDate[date_key]
)

Name: Start of Last Week
Expression:
VAR TodayDate = TODAY()
VAR WeekdayNum = WEEKDAY(TodayDate, 2)
RETURN
    TodayDate - WeekdayNum - 6

Name: End of Last Week
Expression:
VAR TodayDate = TODAY()
VAR WeekdayNum = WEEKDAY(TodayDate, 2)
RETURN
    TodayDate - WeekdayNum

Name: Selected Period
Expression: SELECTEDVALUE(PeriodType[Period], "Week")

Name: Period Start
Expression:
VAR today   = TODAY()
  VAR p       = [Selected Period]
  VAR weekday = WEEKDAY(today, 2)          -- Monday=1, Sunday=7
  VAR lastMonday = today - weekday + 1 - 7 -- Monday of last complete week
  VAR firstThisMonth = DATE(YEAR(today), MONTH(today), 1)
  RETURN IF(p = "Week", lastMonday, EDATE(firstThisMonth, -1))

Name: Period End
Expression:
VAR today   = TODAY()
  VAR p       = [Selected Period]
  VAR weekday = WEEKDAY(today, 2)
  VAR lastSunday = today - weekday + 1 - 1 -- Sunday ending last complete week
  VAR firstThisMonth = DATE(YEAR(today), MONTH(today), 1)
  RETURN IF(p = "Week", lastSunday, firstThisMonth - 1)

Name: Prev Period Start
Expression:
VAR today   = TODAY()
  VAR p       = [Selected Period]
  VAR weekday = WEEKDAY(today, 2)
  VAR twoWeeksAgoMonday = today - weekday + 1 - 14
  VAR firstThisMonth = DATE(YEAR(today), MONTH(today), 1)
  RETURN IF(p = "Week", twoWeeksAgoMonday, EDATE(firstThisMonth, -2))

Name: Prev Period End
Expression:
VAR today   = TODAY()
  VAR p       = [Selected Period]
  VAR weekday = WEEKDAY(today, 2)
  VAR lastMonday = today - weekday + 1 - 7
  VAR firstThisMonth = DATE(YEAR(today), MONTH(today), 1)
  RETURN IF(p = "Week", lastMonday - 1, EDATE(firstThisMonth, -1) - 1)

Name: Period Label
Expression:
VAR p = [Selected Period]
  VAR s = [Period Start]
  RETURN "Period: " & IF(
      p = "Week",
      "W" & WEEKNUM(s, 21),
      FORMAT(s, "MMMM")
  )

Name: Check Week
Expression:
FORMAT([Start of Last Week], "yyyy-mm-dd")
& " -> "
& FORMAT([End of Last Week], "yyyy-mm-dd")

Name: Debug Week Flag
Expression:
VAR LastWeek = [Last Completed Week]
VAR CurrentWeek =
    SELECTEDVALUE(DimDate[isoweek])
RETURN
SWITCH(
    TRUE(),
    CurrentWeek = LastWeek, "Last Week",
    CurrentWeek = LastWeek - 1, "Week Before",
    "Other"
)

Name: Prev Period Label
Expression:
VAR p = [Selected Period]
  VAR s = [Prev Period Start]
  RETURN "Previous: " & IF(
      p = "Week",
      "W" & WEEKNUM(s, 21),
      FORMAT(s, "MMMM")
  )

Name: Period Summary
Expression: "Period: " & [Period Label] & " | Previous: " & [Prev Period Label]

Name: Linear Created
Expression:
VAR periodStart = [Period Start]
  VAR periodEnd   = [Period End]
  RETURN
  CALCULATE(
      COUNTROWS(FactLinear),
      FactLinear[created_at] >= periodStart,
      FactLinear[created_at] <= periodEnd
  )

Name: Linear Created Prev
Expression:
VAR periodStart = [Prev Period Start]
  VAR periodEnd   = [Prev Period End]
  RETURN
  CALCULATE(
      COUNTROWS(FactLinear),
      FactLinear[created_at] >= periodStart,
      FactLinear[created_at] <= periodEnd
  )

Name: Linear Created Δ%
Expression: DIVIDE([Linear Created] - [Linear Created Prev], [Linear Created Prev])

Name: Linear Closed
Expression:
VAR periodStart = [Period Start]
  VAR periodEnd   = [Period End]
  RETURN
  CALCULATE(
      COUNTROWS(FactLinear),
      FactLinear[closed_at] >= periodStart,
      FactLinear[closed_at] <= periodEnd,
      NOT ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at])
  )

Name: Linear Closed Prev
Expression:
VAR periodStart = [Prev Period Start]
  VAR periodEnd   = [Prev Period End]
  RETURN
  CALCULATE(
      COUNTROWS(FactLinear),
      FactLinear[closed_at] >= periodStart,
      FactLinear[closed_at] <= periodEnd,
      NOT ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at])
  )

Name: Linear Closed Δ%
Expression: DIVIDE([Linear Closed] - [Linear Closed Prev], [Linear Closed Prev])

Name: Linear Open at Period End
Expression:
VAR periodEnd = [Period End]
  RETURN
  CALCULATE(
      COUNTROWS(FactLinear),
      REMOVEFILTERS(DimDate),
      FILTER(
          FactLinear,
          FactLinear[created_at] <= periodEnd &&
          (ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at]) || FactLinear[closed_at] > periodEnd)
      )
  )

Name: Linear Open at Prev Period End
Expression:
VAR periodEnd = [Prev Period End]
  RETURN
  CALCULATE(
      COUNTROWS(FactLinear),
      REMOVEFILTERS(DimDate),
      FILTER(
          FactLinear,
          FactLinear[created_at] <= periodEnd &&
          (ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at]) || FactLinear[closed_at] > periodEnd)
      )
  )

Name: Linear Open Δ
Expression: [Linear Open at Period End] - [Linear Open at Prev Period End]

Name: Linear Incidents
Expression:
VAR periodStart = [Period Start]
  VAR periodEnd   = [Period End]
  RETURN
  COALESCE(
      CALCULATE(
          COUNTROWS(FactLinear),
          FactLinear[created_at] >= periodStart,
          FactLinear[created_at] <= periodEnd,
          FactLinear[is_incident] = TRUE()
      ),
      0
  )

Name: Linear Incidents Prev
Expression:
VAR periodStart = [Prev Period Start]
  VAR periodEnd   = [Prev Period End]
  RETURN
  COALESCE(
      CALCULATE(
          COUNTROWS(FactLinear),
          FactLinear[created_at] >= periodStart,
          FactLinear[created_at] <= periodEnd,
          FactLinear[is_incident] = TRUE()
      ),
      0
  )

Name: Linear Incidents Δ
Expression: [Linear Incidents] - [Linear Incidents Prev]

Name: Linear Created (Chart)
Expression: COUNTROWS(FactLinear)

Name: Linear Closed (Chart)
Expression:
CALCULATE(
      COUNTROWS(FactLinear),
      USERELATIONSHIP(DimDate[date_key], FactLinear[closed_at]),
      NOT ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at])
  )

Name: Linear Open Issues (Chart)
Expression:
VAR monthEnd = MIN(MAX(DimDate[date_key]), TODAY())
  RETURN
  COUNTROWS(
      FILTER(
          ALL(FactLinear),
          FactLinear[created_at] <= monthEnd &&
          (ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at]) || FactLinear[closed_at] > monthEnd)
      )
  )

Name: Linear Avg Days to Close
Expression:
VAR periodStart = [Period Start]
  VAR periodEnd   = [Period End]
  RETURN
  CALCULATE(
      AVERAGE(FactLinear[days_to_close]),
      FactLinear[closed_at] >= periodStart,
      FactLinear[closed_at] <= periodEnd,
      NOT ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at])
  )

Name: Linear Avg Days to Close Prev
Expression:
VAR periodStart = [Prev Period Start]
  VAR periodEnd   = [Prev Period End]
  RETURN
  CALCULATE(
      AVERAGE(FactLinear[days_to_close]),
      FactLinear[closed_at] >= periodStart,
      FactLinear[closed_at] <= periodEnd,
      NOT ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at])
  )

Name: Linear Avg Days to Close Δ
Expression: [Linear Avg Days to Close] - [Linear Avg Days to Close Prev]

Name: Linear Oldest Issue
Expression:
VAR today = TODAY()
  RETURN
  MAXX(
      FILTER(FactLinear, ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at])),
      DATEDIFF(FactLinear[created_at], today, DAY)
  )

Name: Linear Oldest Issue Prev
Expression:
VAR periodEnd = [Prev Period End]
  RETURN
  MAXX(
      FILTER(
          FactLinear,
          FactLinear[created_at] <= periodEnd &&
          (ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at]) || FactLinear[closed_at] > periodEnd)
      ),
      DATEDIFF(FactLinear[created_at], periodEnd, DAY)
  )

Name: Linear Oldest Issue Δ
Expression: [Linear Oldest Issue] - [Linear Oldest Issue Prev]

Name: Wait Threshold Value
Expression: SELECTEDVALUE('Wait Threshold'[Wait Threshold], 30)

Name: Avg Days to Close
Expression:
CALCULATE(
      AVERAGE(FactLinear[days_to_close]),
      USERELATIONSHIP(DimDate[date_key], FactLinear[closed_at]),
      NOT ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at])
  )

Name: Median Days to Close
Expression:
CALCULATE(
      MEDIAN(FactLinear[days_to_close]),
      USERELATIONSHIP(DimDate[date_key], FactLinear[closed_at]),
      NOT ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at])
  )

Name: Created 3M MA
Expression:
VAR monthEnd = MAX(DimDate[date_key])
  VAR window3Start = DATE(YEAR(EDATE(monthEnd, -2)), MONTH(EDATE(monthEnd, -2)), 1)
  RETURN DIVIDE(
      CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactLinear), ALL(DimDate),
          FactLinear[created_at] >= window3Start,
          FactLinear[created_at] <= monthEnd),
      3)

Name: Closed 3M MA
Expression:
VAR monthEnd = MAX(DimDate[date_key])
  VAR window3Start = DATE(YEAR(EDATE(monthEnd, -2)), MONTH(EDATE(monthEnd, -2)), 1)
  RETURN DIVIDE(
      CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactLinear), ALL(DimDate),
          NOT ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at]),
          FactLinear[closed_at] >= window3Start,
          FactLinear[closed_at] <= monthEnd),
      3)

Name: Avg Created to Closed 3M
Expression:
VAR monthEnd = MAX(DimDate[date_key])
  VAR window3Start = DATE(YEAR(EDATE(monthEnd, -2)), MONTH(EDATE(monthEnd, -2)), 1)
  RETURN CALCULATE(
      AVERAGEX(FILTER(FactLinear, NOT ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at])),
          FactLinear[days_to_close]),
      ALL(DimDate),
      FactLinear[closed_at] >= window3Start,
      FactLinear[closed_at] <= monthEnd)

Name: Avg Created to Started 3M
Expression:
VAR monthEnd = MAX(DimDate[date_key])
  VAR window3Start = DATE(YEAR(EDATE(monthEnd, -2)), MONTH(EDATE(monthEnd, -2)), 1)
  RETURN CALCULATE(
      AVERAGEX(
          FILTER(FactLinear,
              NOT ISBLANK(FactLinear[started_at])
              && NOT ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at])
              && FactLinear[days_to_start] >= 0),
          FactLinear[days_to_start]),
      ALL(DimDate),
      FactLinear[closed_at] >= window3Start,
      FactLinear[closed_at] <= monthEnd)

Name: Avg Started to Closed 3M
Expression:
VAR monthEnd = MAX(DimDate[date_key])
  VAR window3Start = DATE(YEAR(EDATE(monthEnd, -2)), MONTH(EDATE(monthEnd, -2)), 1)
  RETURN CALCULATE(
      AVERAGEX(
          FILTER(FactLinear,
              NOT ISBLANK(FactLinear[started_at])
              && NOT ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at])),
          FactLinear[days_to_close] - FactLinear[days_to_start]),
      ALL(DimDate),
      FactLinear[closed_at] >= window3Start,
      FactLinear[closed_at] <= monthEnd)

Name: Oldest Open Issue
Oldest Open Identifier
Expression:
VAR oldestDate = CALCULATE(
      MIN(FactLinear[created_at]),
      ALL(FactLinear),
      ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at])
  )
  RETURN CALCULATE(
      MAX(FactLinear[identifier]),
      ALL(FactLinear),
      ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at]),
      FactLinear[created_at] = oldestDate
  )

Name: Oldest Open Title
Expression:
VAR oldestDate = CALCULATE(
      MIN(FactLinear[created_at]),
      ALL(FactLinear),
      ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at])
  )
  RETURN CALCULATE(
      MAX(FactLinear[title]),
      ALL(FactLinear),
      ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at]),
      FactLinear[created_at] = oldestDate
  )

Name: Closed
Expression:
CALCULATE(
      COUNTROWS(FactLinear),
      USERELATIONSHIP(DimDate[date_key], FactLinear[closed_at]),
      NOT ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at])
  )

Name: Created
Expression: COUNTROWS(FactLinear)

Name: Open
Expression:
CALCULATE(
      COUNTROWS(FactLinear),
      REMOVEFILTERS(DimDate),
      ISBLANK(FactLinear[closed_at])
  )

Name: Incidents
Expression: CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactLinear), FactLinear[is_incident] = TRUE())
